testcase.name: test_create_estate_without_special_status
testcase.failure: tests/test_eligibility_estate_creation.py:161: in test_create_estate_without_special_status user = self.create_test_user("none") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_eligibility_estate_creation.py:37: in create_test_user assert resp.status_code in (200, 201), f"Failed to register: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to register: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please wait before trying again."} E assert 429 in (200, 201) E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_estate_with_beneficiaries_and_special_status
testcase.failure: tests/test_eligibility_estate_creation.py:180: in test_create_estate_with_beneficiaries_and_special_status user = self.create_test_user("with_ben") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_eligibility_estate_creation.py:37: in create_test_user assert resp.status_code in (200, 201), f"Failed to register: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to register: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please wait before trying again."} E assert 429 in (200, 201) E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
